Hook: Your annual checkup can spot cancer risk before symptoms do.

Problem.headline: Cancer risk changes quietly.
Problem.body: Family history, lifestyle, medications, and symptoms evolve over time. Without a current prevention plan, screening gaps can stay hidden.

ValuePropositions.title: Know your risk profile
ValuePropositions.body: Review age, family history, lifestyle factors, and symptoms with your care team.

ValuePropositions.title: Stay current on screenings
ValuePropositions.body: Annual visits help confirm which screenings fit your age, history, and risk level.

ValuePropositions.title: Act earlier with confidence
ValuePropositions.body: Earlier detection can open more treatment options and protect the years ahead.

CallToAction.headline: Schedule your next checkup.
CallToAction.body: Ask which screenings are right for you and leave with a prevention plan you can follow.
